title: Parallax freeze-time-frozen review policy snapshot (v0.38 5.2)
description: The [review] budget/policy actually in force, pinned at spec FREEZE by `scripts/pre-freeze-budget.py pin-policy` into .parallax/<slug>/review-policy.frozen.json and committed with the contract. This closes the RUN1 live finding where a rounds-exceeded epic-gate HOLD was cleared by sed-editing codex.toml max_rounds 2->3 post-hoc and re-stamping the ledgers: from v0.38, scripts/epic-gate.py, scripts/triage.py (--pinned-policy) and scripts/merge-ledger.py evaluate rounds_used against THIS pinned budget — the live codex.toml must hash-match it (mismatch fails closed), and widening is sanctioned ONLY by a recorded review-budget amendment (scripts/contract-amend.py, kind review-budget-amendment) whose chain starts from this snapshot's policy_hash. Never edited in place; pin-policy refuses to overwrite a different snapshot.

source_policy_sha256.description: sha256 of the raw codex.toml bytes the snapshot was pinned from (full-file provenance).

policy_hash.description: scripts/triage.py policy_hash() canonicalization of `policy` — the same 16-hex value merge-ledger stamps into ledgers, so a ledger is bound to the PINNED policy, not to whatever codex.toml says at gate time.
